steps.title: Basic Game Settings
steps.text: Two to five players usually play Teen Patti, with each player holding three cards. With the exception of the little king, it employs two set decks of cards, for a total of 106 cards.

steps.title: Fundamental Game Rules
steps.text: Three hands are handed to each participant, and the larger hand wins after the cards are compared based on the type of hand.

steps.title: Types of Cards
list: Trail, Trio, or Set (three individuals of the same rank)
Straight Flush, Pure Sequence, or Pure Run (three cards in the same suit in a row)
Run/Straight/Sequence (three cards in a row, not all in the same suit)
Color/Flush (three identical cards, not in order)
Pair/Two of a Kind (two identically ranked cards)
High Card: three cards that don't fit into any of the combinations listed above

steps.title: Ante Betting
steps.text: Each player puts a certain amount into the pot, which is the starting wager. After shuffling the deck, the dealer deals each player three cards, face down.

privacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy | Starsuu7
privacyPolicyPage.description: Learn how Starsuu7 (UU7 • 777) collects, uses, and protects your personal information. Your privacy and data security are our top priorities.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: Welcome to Starsuu7 ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application and website (our "Services"). Please read this policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms of this privacy policy, please do not access the Services.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content:
We may collect information about you in a variety of ways. The information we may collect via the Services includes:

  • Personal Data: Personally identifiable information, such as your name, email address, and telephone number, that you voluntarily give to us when you register with the Services.
  • Financial Data: Financial information, such as data related to your payment method (e.g., valid credit card number, card brand, expiration date) that we may collect when you make a deposit or request a withdrawal.
  • Data from Social Networks: User information from social networking sites, such as Facebook, Google, if you connect your account to such social networks.

sections.title: 3. Use of Your Information
sections.content:
Having accurate information about you permits us to provide you with a smooth, efficient, and customized experience. Specifically, we may use information collected about you via the Services to:

  • Create and manage your account.
  • Process your transactions and send you related information, including purchase confirmations and invoices.
  • Monitor and analyze usage and trends to improve your experience with the Services.
  • Notify you of updates to the Services.
  • Resolve disputes and troubleshoot problems.

sections.title: 4. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the in-app support chat or via our support email address.

termsOfServicePage.title: Terms of Service | Starsuu7
termsOfServicePage.description: Read the official Terms of Service for using the Starsuu7 (UU7 • 777) app and website. Understand the rules, your responsibilities, and our commitments.

sections.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
sections.content: By using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Services. We may modify the Terms at any time, and such modifications shall be effective immediately upon posting.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility and Account
sections.content:
You must be at least 18 years of age to use our Services. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and for restricting access to your device. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.

Our real-money gaming services are not available in the states of Assam, Arunachal Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Odisha, and Nagaland.

sections.title: 3. User Conduct
sections.content:
You agree not to use the Services for any unlawful purpose or any purpose prohibited under this clause. You agree not to use the Services in any way that could damage the Services, the reputation of Starsuu7, or the general business of Starsuu7.

  • You will not engage in any form of cheating or collusion.
  • You will not use any unauthorized third-party software.
  • You will not harass, abuse, or harm another person or group.

sections.title: 4. Termination
sections.content: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to the Services immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of the Terms.

sections.title: 5. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the in-app support chat.

responsibleGamingPage.title: Responsible Gaming | Starsuu7
responsibleGamingPage.description: Starsuu7 (UU7 • 777) is committed to responsible gaming. Learn about our policies, tools for self-control, and resources to help you play safely and responsibly.

sections.title: 1. Our Commitment
sections.content: Starsuu7 is committed to providing a fun and entertaining gaming experience while promoting responsible gaming practices. We believe in protecting our players and providing a secure environment. Gaming should be an enjoyable leisure activity and not a source of financial stress.

sections.title: 2. Age Verification
sections.content: We strictly prohibit anyone under the age of 18 from playing our games. We perform age verification checks and may request identification documents to verify a player's age. Any account found to be used by an underage individual will be immediately terminated.

sections.title: 3. Playing Responsibly
sections.content:
To ensure you continue to enjoy safe and manageable play, we encourage you to keep the following in mind:

  • Play for entertainment, not as a way of making money.
  • Only play with money you can afford to lose.
  • Set limits for your deposits, wagers, and losses before you start playing.
  • Never chase your losses.
  • Balance gaming with other activities.
  • Do not play when you are under stress, depressed, or under the influence.

sections.title: 4. Self-Exclusion
sections.content: If you feel that you are developing a dependency on gaming, we offer a self-exclusion feature. You can request to be temporarily or permanently excluded from our services by contacting our customer support team. During the self-exclusion period, you will not be able to access your account.

sections.title: 5. Getting Help
sections.content: If you are concerned about your gaming habits or are affected by someone else's, there are resources available to provide help and support. We encourage you to seek assistance from relevant counseling organizations if you feel you need it.
